text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
"How are you doing, Scarlet? Is there anything on
your mind?"

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
"I'm fine, so don't worry! Do your best with work,
Mom!" ...And send.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I guess this is fine.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: ...Maybe I should go for a walk to clear my head.

Hah! This is my last one, King! The thing is,
yesterday...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I was practicing my starts when I walloped the
gate before it opened!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Ugh, you dingus! How many times have I told you
to exit the starting gate swiftly and elegantly?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I know! I tried to tell myself that, but I was
burning with so much fighting spirit, my fist just
moved on its own!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Sigh... You never change. Hmm, I suppose I should think up a method for my teachings to better stick.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Isn't there some line you love from that show... What was it again? Princess Fighter? Umm... "Put your feelings into your fist..."

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
"Put your feelings into your fist, and unleash them
beyond your dreams!" ...I understand now, King!
You're saying I should put my feelings into my
legs!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Thank you very much! That brings our 243rd royal
meeting to a close! I'm looking forward to the
next one!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Kawakami and King... Listen to the way they talk
with each other. They really do get along...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Oh my, Scarlet! How do you do? Are you perhaps
interested in our royal meetings too?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Oh, no, I just happened to pass by, and... I was
thinking how wonderful it must be to have
someone you can talk to about anything.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Indeed. King resolves any and all concerns I toss
her way! That's why I ask her all sorts of things!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Well, I mean... I think you're incredible, too,
Kawakami!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I always worry that expressing my feelings
honestly to someone might invite their scorn...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Actually, I think lots of people lack the courage
to say what they really feel.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Oh? The way I see it, saying what you really feel
makes the other person happy!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Huh? Why do you say that?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Telling someone how you feel means you want
them to know you! In other words...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
You're sending a signal that says you want to
become closer to that person.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: ...A signal?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Indeed! That's why anyone would be overjoyed to
know that you want to get along with them!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
And by expressing your true feelings, you're
asking the other person to do the same.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Then, after exchanging more and more feelings
with each other, you'll develop an even deeper
bond!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: ...So if I express my feelings, we'll become closer?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
King and Kawakami really are wonderful. Maybe
if Mom and I could have that kind of bond...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: No... I want to forge that kind of bond.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, I spot Daiwa Scarlet in the central
plaza.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
"I've already written the date of your next visit in
my journal. I'm really looking forward to seeing
you again, Mom!" ...Okay, send.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I'm still uneasy about discussing certain things
with her...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
But I'm going to send her a signal that conveys my
feelings!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As she says this, I see a look of strong
determination in Daiwa Scarlet's eyes.
